content.title: The Letter
content.logline: Mira reopens the case after finding a sealed letter.
content.opening_hook: Mira finds a sealed letter hidden under her door.
content.main_conflict: Mira must confront Rowan over the hidden archive letter.
content.emotional_payoff: Mira chooses action instead of silence.
content.cliffhanger: The letter points to a second file in the archive.

beats.summary: Mira reopens the case after finding a sealed letter.

elements.text: Mira finds the sealed letter and grips it under the archive light.
This letter reopens the case tonight.
